caption: A man with dark hair and a beard, wearing a white t-shirt under a dark blazer, stands on a stage beside a large projection screen. The screen displays the text "CRYPTO-ML LTD." followed by a list of bullet points: "Let's jump the hype-train!", "A large scale crypto-analysis platform", "Heavy compute data analysis, Transform, Fetch...", and "Going deep running predictions on LSTMs". At the bottom of the slide, the question "CAN WE SURVIVE THE 2017 CRYPTO-CRAZE?" is written in all caps. The bottom banner of the projection includes the "europython" logo and the text "Edinburgh 23 29 July 2018". As the scene progresses, the man gestures with his hands while speaking to an unseen audience, moving from a raised arm to a pointing motion and finally gesturing outward. The background remains a dark room with the illuminated presentation screen as the primary light source.
